content.en:
The power of the Great Thousand Dao Technique is much stronger than the Middle Thousand Dao Technique, and at Ye Tian's level, even if the Middle Thousand Dao Technique is cultivated to the extreme level, the power is just like that, at most, it is equivalent to the entry level of the Great Thousand Dao Technique.

But there are some powerful Great Thousand Dao Techniques, but when you get started, they are much more powerful than the Extreme Level Middle Thousand Dao Techniques.

Ye Tian didn't have mastered a Great Thousand Dao Technique now, so he naturally had to choose some Great Thousand Dao Techniques.

There are a lot of Great Thousand Dao Techniques in the Black Wind Mountain Heavenly King Library, there are hundreds of inheritances in total, and these are all open inheritances, and anyone who has just entered the Heavenly King is qualified to choose three Great Thousand Dao Techniques.

And Ye Tian, as the Great Heavenly King, has the right to choose ten Great Thousand Dao Techniques, this is the treatment of being a Great Heavenly King, and there is no need to worry about Great Thousand Dao Techniques.

And like some Dao Ancestors of small forces, let alone the Great Thousand Dao Technique, there is no way to even obtain the Middle Thousand Dao Technique.

Ye Tian flipped through the brief inheritance of one Great Thousand Dao Technique, and after a long time, he finally determined the Ten Great Thousand Dao Technique.

Great Thousand Dao Technique - Heavenly Illusion Divine Step!

Daqian Dao Technique - Nine Turns Immortal Golden Body!

Great Thousand Dao Technique - Ancient Slashing Technique!

Great Thousand Dao Technique - Soul Golden Bell Technique!

Great Thousand Dao Technique - Ancient Desolate Body!

These five Great Thousand Dao Techniques are the Great Thousand Dao Techniques that Ye Tian is more satisfied with, among them, the Ancient Desolate Body is an advanced Great Thousand Dao Technique of the Great Desolate Body, he has already cultivated the Great Desolate Law Body to the extreme level, so it will be much easier to cultivate the Ancient Desolate Body.

In addition, he chose the bondage-type Great Thousand Dao Technique-Ten Directions Void Fixing Technique, and the tracking-class Great Thousand Dao Technique-Sanguo Tianmu Technique!

The remaining three are all attack-type Great Thousand Dao Techniques—the Five Elements Holy Light Technique, the Infinite Space Divine Spear, and the Space-Time Interception Technique.

Among them, the space-time truncation technique is the most bizarre, although it is an attack-like Dao technique, but it does not directly hurt people, but cuts a person's body into two pieces and sends them into different time and space, making it difficult for the enemy to heal the body.

But once you give up one of your bodies, your strength will drop a lot.

But the attack power of this Great Thousand Dao Technique is too weak, and for an enemy of the same rank, it can't cut the opponent's body at all.

Therefore, this is a bit of a chicken rib Daqiandao technique!

However, there are no absolutes, and in some cases, the Space-Time Truncation Technique is definitely an incomparably remarkable technique.

After choosing these ten Dao techniques, Ye Tian passed them on one by one.

After that, Ye Tian continued to browse various classics in the library to increase his knowledge and heritage.

He also needs to create a Dao Classic Technique that suits him, otherwise he can only slowly accumulate forbidden Dao power and soul power at the level of Dao Ancestor, and the improvement of strength will not have any impact at the beginning, but it will be more difficult in the later stage.

Therefore, a Taoist practice that fits perfectly with oneself must be created.

If Ye Tian is allowed to create it slowly, it will probably take a long time, but there is a lot of Black Wind Mountain.

For example, the Heavenly King level can enter the Creation Gong Dao Hall of Black Wind Mountain, so as to carry out the Creation Exercises.

The Dao Hall of Transmission has the perception of countless ancestors and powerhouses to create exercises, and it can also greatly improve their understanding, and at the same time it has built 100,000 times the time to accelerate, which is the most suitable place for creating gong.

Of course.

If you open the Creation Dao Palace, the resources of the first ten thousand years will be provided by the Black Wind Mountain, and you will need to provide it yourself.

Under normal circumstances, 10,000 years is enough time for a Dao Ancestor to create a Dao Hall suitable for himself.

But Ye Tian is different, his foundation is too strong, and the Dao canon exercises that are suitable for him must be very powerful, so the time he needs will definitely be very long, and it will definitely be more than 10,000 years.

The Chuanggong Dao Hall is very simple, Ye Tian entered it, and sat cross-legged on the Chuanggong platform in the center of the Chuanggong Dao Hall specially used for Chuanggong.

Immediately, the Creation Gong Dao Hall opened.

Rumble!!!!

One after another illusory figures emerged, they were all ancient predecessors, Ye Tian saw some of their feelings when they created their merits, each of them left their understanding of meritorious service, maybe the things left by one person are limited, but the things left by countless people are extremely precious.

Ye Tian realized little by little, and began to create his own Dao Classics from scratch, building the foundation of the Dao Classics step by step.

Time passed slowly, and thousands of years gradually passed in the outside world.

And Ye Tian replenished the energy needed to open the Creation Dao Palace, and a large amount of energy Dao stones were consumed, but Ye Tian didn't care at all.

In this way, 10,000 years and 10,000 years passed.

It wasn't until the thirteen00,000th year of the outside world that Ye Tian finally stopped the operation of the Creation Gong Dao Palace.

"It's finally created!"

Ye Tian walked out of the Creation Gong Dao Hall and said with a sigh of relief.

After such a long time, and he also used a number of forbidden and strange things that can improve his understanding, and through the experience of countless ancestors, he successfully created his own Taoist scriptures.

Ye Tian named this Taoist canon the Nine Extremes Daodian!

The Nine Extremes Dao Code involves a part of the forbidden Dao, and if it is cultivated by other people, it will not be able to be cultivated at all, and it is only suitable for him to cultivate.

It allowed Ye Tian to use the Forbidden Dao to improve his cultivation strength, and continuously improve his body, soul, and forbidden Dao power, which was far from comparable to other Dao canons.

"Now that the Dao Classics are available, and the Great Thousand Dao Techniques are also available, it's time to go back to retreat and cultivate!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In this retreat, he believed that his strength would inevitably skyrocket, and it was inevitable to step into the combat power of the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!

Wow!

Ye Tian left the small realm of the Wind King and returned to the human race.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian began to announce his retreat, devoting himself to cultivating the Great Thousand Dao Technique and the Nine Extremes Dao Classics.

Day by day, the changes in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm are simply changing with each passing day.

The Terrans are getting stronger and stronger, more and more True Ancestors are born, and more and more geniuses are born.

And everywhere in the Mysterious Ancient Realm, primeval chaotic life was gradually born!

These primeval chaos beings are all powerful and gifted, and they have been cultivated by the big forces one after another.

After all, any primeval chaos life, as long as it is cultivated a little, can grow into a true ancestor.

Therefore, the primeval chaos life is definitely one of the races that the major sects like to recruit the most, and they almost don't need to conduct any assessments, they are directly recruited.

At the same time, many genius disciples of great forces also challenged everywhere and made a name for themselves in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

For example, Emperor Fengyang, one of the top ten emperors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, challenged the true ancestors of the middle and triple heaven forces one by one, and defeated the invincible true ancestors of one sect after another, and his reputation shocked the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and even some invincible Dao ancestors of the upper three heavens wanted to challenge him, but they were easily defeated by him.

this day.

He passed by the Terrans, wanting to challenge the true ancestors of the Terrans.
